summary: Calculates an estimate for a subscription
description: Calculates an estimate for a subscription. Endpoint: POST /c/{company_id}/billing/estimate. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include addons, billing_period, billing_plan_id, fte_range.

params.name: fte_range
params.description: Optional bracket with number of employees. Example: 1-20

example_request:
POST /c/{company_id}/billing/estimate

Required params: company_id

Optional params: addons, billing_period, billing_plan_id, fte_range
